sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Monday.com (MNDY) Rises Yet Lags Behind Market: Some Facts Worth Knowing
feed.summary: Monday.com (MNDY) saw a 1.81% increase in its recent trading session, closing at $69.11, but this performance lagged behind the broader market indices like the S&P 500, Dow, and Nasdaq. The company is expected to report an EPS of $0.98, a 10.91% decrease year-over-year, and revenue of $338.9 million, up 20.07%. With a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold) and attractive valuation metrics like a Forward P/E of 15.95 and PEG ratio of 0.58, investors are watching its upcoming earnings disclosure closely.

feed.title: March Social Media Round-Up—2025 Annual Review, World’s Most Ethical Companies, and More
feed.summary: Pfizer's March social media round-up highlights key achievements including being recognized as one of the World’s Most Ethical Companies for the fifth year. The company's CEO, Albert Bourla, shared the 2025 Annual Review and advancements in oncology and obesity research. The update also features positive results from ongoing studies and a look into breast cancer research and drug discovery processes.

feed.title: Veeam Recognized as a 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for Backup and Data Protection Platforms
feed.summary: Veeam Software has been named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights ‘Voice of the Customer’: Backup and Data Protection Platforms, based on end-user feedback and high ratings for its data resilience solutions. The company also highlights its strategy to unify data resilience, data security, and AI governance, supported by its acquisition of Securiti AI and introduction of Agent Commander. This recognition follows Veeam's ninth consecutive placement in the Leaders Quadrant of the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Backup & Data Protection Platforms.

feed.title: Iran tells Microsoft, Amazon and Boeing employees to evacuate Middle East offices immediately after attacks threatened
feed.summary: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has issued a warning for employees of 18 major American companies, including Microsoft, Amazon, and Boeing, to evacuate their Middle East offices by Wednesday morning ahead of threatened attacks. The IRGC accuses these companies of supporting U.S. and Israeli military operations in the ongoing conflict, citing previous damage to Amazon Web Services data centers. While the credibility of the threat is being assessed, affected companies are taking steps to protect their personnel and facilities.

feed.title: Old Dominion will post Q1 results before market opens April 29
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. (Nasdaq: ODFL) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. The company will host a conference call to discuss these results and its outlook at 10:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day, with a webcast available at ir.odfl.com and a telephonic replay accessible afterward. Old Dominion provides LTL motor carrier services across North America, including expedited transportation and value-added services.

feed.title: PODD Investor Alert: Insulet Corp. Potential Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Company Allegedly Concealed Device Defect: Levi & Korsinsky
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert regarding a potential securities fraud lawsuit against Insulet Corp. (NASDAQ: PODD). This follows a voluntary medical device correction disclosing a design defect in Omnipod 5 insulin pods that led to insulin leakage and serious adverse events. The firm is investigating whether the company concealed this defect from investors before its public disclosure.

feed.title: Massimo Group Reports FY2025 Results, Delivers Margin Expansion and Advances Premium Product Pipeline
feed.summary: Massimo Group (NASDAQ: MAMO) announced its financial results for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, reporting improved gross margins and a strategic rebalancing of dealer inventory. Despite a decrease in revenue and net income compared to FY2024, the company's gross margin expanded significantly to 37.5%. Massimo Group is also advancing its premium product pipeline with the introduction of HVAC-equipped UTVs and electric carts, aiming for higher-value opportunities and stable long-term growth.

feed.title: Principal Financial sets April 24 investor call after Q1 results
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (Nasdaq: PFG) announced that it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after market close on April 23, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results will be held on April 24, 2026, at 10 a.m. ET, featuring leadership and a Q&A session. Interested parties can access the webcast and related materials on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Profit more than doubled as MicroAlgo cut costs and lifted 2025 earnings
feed.summary: MicroAlgo (NASDAQ: MLGO) announced a substantial increase in net profit for the year ended December 31, 2025, reaching RMB 127.56 million (USD 18.15 million), a 143.5% rise year-over-year. Diluted earnings per share also surged by 272.7% to RMB 14.87. This growth was attributed to strong profitability, effective cost control measures, and an increase in total shareholders' equity.

feed.title: Chip veteran Kurt Sievers joins Booking board as Lynn Radakovich exits
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) has appointed Kurt Sievers, the former CEO of NXP Semiconductors, to its Board of Directors, effective April 1, 2026. Sievers brings extensive experience in technology, mobility, and global consumer markets from his leadership at NXP from 2020 to 2025. Concurrently, Lynn Radakovich will retire from the board at the company's Annual Meeting in June after a decade of service.

feed.title: Franklin Templeton Agrees to Acquire Liquid Strategies from CoinFund Spinoff, Launches Franklin Crypto
feed.summary: Franklin Templeton is set to acquire 250 Digital, an active cryptocurrency investment management firm, which includes its investment team and liquid cryptocurrency strategies previously managed by CoinFund. This acquisition will lead to the formation of Franklin Crypto, co-led by Christopher Perkins, Seth Ginns, and Tony Pecore, aiming to expand Franklin Templeton's digital asset investment management platform and enhance its capabilities in the digital asset market. The transaction, expected to close in Q2 2026, will notably involve BENJI tokens as part of the payment consideration, showcasing an innovative approach to M&A on-chain.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin will post Q1 results before markets open Apr. 23
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) will webcast its first-quarter 2026 earnings results conference call on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The earnings will be published prior to market open on the same day. An on-demand replay and podcast will be available through May 7, 2026.

feed.title: APO Investor Alert: APOLLO GLOBAL MANAGEMENT, INC. Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Allegedly Misrepresenting CEO Accountability: Levi & Korsinsky
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert regarding a securities class action lawsuit against Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO). The lawsuit alleges that CEO Marc Rowan and co-founder Leon Black are individually liable for misrepresenting CEO accountability and making false statements regarding the company's relationship with Jeffrey Epstein. Investors with losses are encouraged to seek lead plaintiff appointment by May 1, 2026.

feed.title: Kefir demand lifts Lifeway forecast to as much as $62.3M in Q1
feed.summary: Lifeway Foods (Nasdaq: LWAY) announced a preliminary outlook for Q1 2026, expecting net sales to increase by 32%-35% year-over-year, reaching $60.8 million to $62.3 million. The company attributes this growth to strong consumer demand for its core kefir and farmer cheese products, alongside expanded distribution and innovation. Lifeway will release its full Q1 2026 financial results on May 14, 2026, before market open.

feed.title: DuPont (DD) Completes $1.8B Sale of Aramids Business
feed.summary: DuPont (DD) has completed the sale of its Aramids division to Arclin for approximately $1.8 billion, receiving $1.2 billion in pre-tax cash, a $300 million note receivable, and a 16% equity stake in Arclin. This strategic divestiture aims to streamline operations and enhance focus on core business segments. Despite this move, DuPont faces challenges in profitability and growth, as indicated by its mixed financial performance and a low Altman Z-Score, suggesting potential financial instability.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft Initiates Coverage on Avery Dennison (NYSE:AVY)
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft has initiated coverage on Avery Dennison (NYSE:AVY) with a "buy" rating and a price target of $200.00, suggesting a 15.71% upside from its current price. This aligns with a generally positive analyst outlook, featuring ten Buy ratings and three Holds, and an average price target of $207.75. The company recently exceeded EPS estimates for its last quarter and provided Q1 2026 EPS guidance of $2.40-$2.46.

feed.title: Halliburton Acquires Sekal AS From Sumitomo
feed.summary: Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) has acquired Sekal AS, a leader in digital drilling autonomy, from Sumitomo Corporation (TYO: 8053). This acquisition strengthens Halliburton's drilling automation services by combining its LOGIX® automation with Sekal's DrillTronics® platform, aiming to reduce well construction costs, increase recovery, and minimize operational risks for customers. The integrated solution has already been deployed in multiple projects, offering benefits like up to 25% reduction in well delivery times through precise well placement, dynamic drilling parameter optimization, and automated tripping operations.

feed.title: Citigroup Reaffirms Neutral Rating for PPG Industries (NYSE:PPG)
feed.summary: Citigroup has reaffirmed a "neutral" rating on PPG Industries (NYSE:PPG) with a $113 price target, indicating a potential 5.53% upside. The company's recent quarterly earnings beat revenue but missed EPS, with analysts anticipating an EPS of 7.95 for the current year. PPG currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $122.71.

feed.title: LTC Properties Inc Stock: Steady Healthcare REIT with Strong Dividend Appeal for North American Inve
feed.summary: LTC Properties Inc is a NYSE-listed real estate investment trust specializing in senior housing and healthcare properties, offering stable rental income through long-term leases with experienced operators. The company's business model, focused on triple-net leases and conservative financial management, supports consistent cash flows and attractive dividend payments. North American investors are drawn to LTC for its competitive dividend yield, exposure to demographic tailwinds, and diversification into healthcare real estate, though they should monitor interest rate fluctuations and operator credit risk.

feed.title: The Boeing Company Stock: Q1 Earnings Ahead Amid Defense Production Expansion and Analyst Optimism
feed.summary: Boeing is set to release its Q1 2026 earnings on April 22, 2026, with investors keenly watching for updates on commercial airplane deliveries and defense contract progress. The company recently announced a significant seven-year framework with the U.S. Department of War to triple PAC-3 seeker production, a move expected to bolster its defense unit and diversify revenue. Analysts view Boeing's defense expansion and undervalued assets positively, despite ongoing challenges in its commercial aviation segment.

feed.title: Once the center of a $3.7 billion buyout, drug blamed for eight deaths draws FDA alert
feed.summary: Amgen's drug Tavneos, which was central to a $3.7 billion buyout, is now facing an FDA safety alert following eight reported deaths. Despite the alert, Amgen has stated it will not withdraw the drug from the market, although it has communicated with the FDA regarding proposed label changes. This development highlights ongoing safety concerns for a major pharmaceutical product.

feed.title: Align Technology Inc Stock: Invisalign Leader Faces Evolving Orthodontics Market in 2026
feed.summary: Align Technology Inc, known for its Invisalign clear aligners, holds a strong position in the digital orthodontics market. The company's business model leverages precision manufacturing and digital services, primarily through Invisalign sales and the iTero scanner ecosystem. While facing competition from 3D printing startups and traditional braces, Align sustains its market lead through intellectual property, partnerships, and an innovation pipeline, with analysts holding a consensus "hold" rating due to balanced growth prospects and valuation concerns.

feed.title: Yum Brands appoints Kathleen K. Oberg to board of directors
feed.summary: Yum Brands Inc. has appointed Kathleen K. Oberg, former CFO of Marriott International, to its board of directors, effective Wednesday. Oberg's compensation will include a one-time stock grant and a prorated annual stock retainer, aligning with standard non-employee director arrangements. This appointment comes as Yum Brands maintains a strong financial position, with 8 consecutive years of dividend increases and a "GOOD" financial health rating from InvestingPro.

feed.title: Agilent Technologies Inc Announces the Biotek Cytation 9 Cell Imaging Multimode Reader
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies, Inc. has launched the BioTek Cytation 9 cell imaging multimode reader, the latest addition to its Cytation portfolio. This new instrument combines multimode microplate reading and high-content cell imaging, streamlining workflows for researchers from basic investigation to high-throughput screening in pharmaceutical and biotechnology labs. The Cytation 9 offers expanded imaging capabilities and advanced hybrid microplate detection for diverse cellular and biochemical assays.

feed.title: OKE: 2026 guidance targets $3.19B–$3.71B net income and $7.9B–$8.3B adjusted EBITDA
feed.summary: ONEOK, Inc. (OKE), an energy infrastructure company with a 60,000-mile pipeline network, has released its 2026 financial guidance. The company expects to achieve net income between $3.19 billion and $3.71 billion and adjusted EBITDA ranging from $7.9 billion to $8.3 billion. This growth is anticipated to be driven by fee-based earnings, significant expansion projects, and strong sustainability performance.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (LW) Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. Posts Q3 Adjusted EPS $0.72 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $0.61
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (LW) reported its Q3 adjusted Earnings Per Share (EPS) of $0.72, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $0.61. This financial update indicates the company's performance relative to analyst expectations for the quarter. The news was published on April 1, 2026, at 08:47 am EDT.

feed.title: PulteGroup Named to Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For® List for Sixth Straight Year
feed.summary: PulteGroup has been recognized for the sixth consecutive year on Fortune's 100 Best Companies to Work For® list, ranking 67th. This distinction is based on feedback from over 5,600 employees, highlighting a culture of inclusivity, community engagement, and strong leadership. The company's commitment to employee development, competitive benefits, and community initiatives like the Built to Honor program contribute to its sustained recognition.

feed.title: Flow Cytometry Market Is Booming So Rapidly | Agilent Technologies Inc. • Danaher • Enzo Life Sciences Inc
feed.summary: The Flow Cytometry market is projected to grow significantly, from USD 8.35 billion in 2025 to USD 17.34 billion by 2032, at a CAGR of 11.0%. A new research report offers detailed economic predictions, competitive landscape analysis, and supply chain insights, covering key players such as Agilent Technologies Inc., Danaher, and Enzo Life Sciences Inc. The report also highlights regional outlooks and employs a robust research methodology to provide comprehensive market insights.

feed.title: A Look At CoStar Group (CSGP) Valuation As Homes.com Spending And Google Competition Stir Investor Uncertainty
feed.summary: CoStar Group is facing investor uncertainty due to competition from Google in home listings, a weak housing market, and significant spending on its Homes.com platform. Despite these concerns, Simply Wall St's analysis suggests the company is undervalued, with an implied upside driven by Homes.com execution and long-term earnings growth. The article presents various valuation perspectives and encourages investors to assess the company's risks and rewards independently.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts Price Target on Quanta Services to $635 From $604, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has raised its price target for Quanta Services (PWR) to $635 from $604, while reiterating an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects continued confidence in the company's performance and future outlook. The news follows several other analyst adjustments for Quanta Services in late March, indicating active market attention on the infrastructure services provider.

feed.title: Arista Networks Stock Has Rallied 58% in the Past Year. Here’s Why the Valuation Still Matters
feed.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) has seen its stock rally 58% over the past year due to strong demand for AI networking and a robust Q4 2025 performance, exceeding revenue and EPS estimates. A valuation model suggests ANET could reach $206 per share by December 2028, representing a 68% total return, driven by anticipated 23% annual revenue growth, 47% operating margins, and a 32x P/E multiple. The company's leadership in AI and cloud networking, coupled with high profitability and significant free cash flow, underpins this premium valuation, although future performance hinges on continued strong execution and sustained AI infrastructure demand.

feed.title: Collegium Pharmaceutical Acquires AZSTARYS for $650M
feed.summary: Collegium Pharmaceutical Inc. has agreed to acquire AZSTARYS from Corium Therapeutics Holdings for $650 million cash, plus potential earn-out considerations. This acquisition aims to diversify Collegium's revenue beyond pain medicines and strengthen its presence in the ADHD market. The deal is expected to contribute to Collegium's revenue base through the late 2030s and lead to expanded margins and higher operating leverage.

feed.title: Assessing nLIGHT (LASR) Valuation After Record Q4 2025 Revenue Growth And Optimistic Q1 2026 Guidance
feed.summary: nLIGHT (LASR) shares reached an all-time high after record Q4 2025 revenue growth and optimistic Q1 2026 guidance, driven by strong momentum in aerospace and defense, and advanced manufacturing. While Simply Wall St's narrative suggests the stock is 15% undervalued with a fair value of $66.75, another view cautions against the high Price-to-Sales ratio of 12.2x compared to an industry average of 2.2x, indicating potential valuation risk. Investors are encouraged to review these mixed sentiments to determine if the market has already factored in future growth.

feed.title: Costco Tariff Lawsuit Tests Member Value Promise And Pricing Trust
feed.summary: A proposed class-action lawsuit against Costco alleges the company raised prices due to tariffs, then sought government refunds without committing to reimburse customers, challenging Costco's core promise of member value. This legal action could impact investor confidence and member trust, prompting scrutiny of Costco's pricing transparency and its handling of tariff-related costs and refunds. The lawsuit highlights the importance for investors to monitor legal developments, Costco's communications regarding refunds, and potential shifts in member sentiment.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Western Digital (WDC) After Its 10x Three Year Surge?
feed.summary: Western Digital (WDC) shares have seen a significant surge, returning 10x over three years, despite recent pullbacks. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests WDC is currently undervalued by about 48% with an estimated intrinsic value of $519.94 per share, compared to its current price of $270. Additionally, its P/E ratio of 23.2x is higher than the industry average, but Simply Wall St’s Fair Ratio indicates it may still be undervalued relative to its growth potential and risk factors.

feed.title: Boeing, Lockheed Martin to boost production of PAC-3 MSE seekers, Pentagon says
feed.summary: The Pentagon has announced a seven-year framework agreement with Boeing and Lockheed Martin to triple the production capacity for Patriot Advanced Capability-3 Missile Segment Enhancement (PAC-3 MSE) seekers. This deal aims to significantly increase the supply of these critical missile components. The agreement supports military readiness and strengthens the defense industrial base.

feed.title: I'm Making a Bold Call on Texas Instruments Stock. Here's My Reasoning.
feed.summary: The author makes a "bold call" that Texas Instruments (TXN) will become a Dividend King, despite lacking the "sex appeal" of AI chipmakers. The company's attractive 3% dividend yield and 22-year streak of annual increases are highlighted as key strengths, underpinned by the essential nature of its analog chips for an increasingly digital world, including AI infrastructure. However, The Motley Fool Stock Advisor analyst team does not recommend Texas Instruments at this time.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Co. and bottlers to invest in South Africa operations
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company, along with its bottlers Coca-Cola Beverages South Africa (CCBSA) and Coca-Cola Peninsula Beverages (CCPB), plans to invest R17.6bn ($1.05bn) into its South African operations by 2030. This significant investment aims to expand production capacity, strengthen distribution, and accelerate innovation within the Coca-Cola system's value chain in the region. The move underscores Coca-Cola's confidence in the South African market and its long-term economic potential.

feed.title: AXIL Brands partners with Home Depot for online sales
feed.summary: AXIL Brands has announced a partnership with Home Depot to sell its hearing protection products, including Bluetooth-enabled earmuffs and earplugs, on HomeDepot.com. This expansion aims to reach DIY enthusiasts and professionals. The company boasts strong financial fundamentals with a 69% gross profit margin and is considered undervalued by InvestingPro analysis.

feed.title: Lamb Weston (NYSE: LW) Q3 2026 earnings fall but guidance and capex outlook improve
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LW) reported a significant fall in Q3 2026 profits, with net income declining 63% despite a 3% rise in net sales. The company attributed the profit drop to unfavorable global price/mix, higher manufacturing costs, and a $32.5 million write-off of excess raw potatoes in its International segment, which saw an 80% decrease in Adjusted EBITDA. Despite this, Lamb Weston raised its fiscal 2026 net sales and tightened Adjusted EBITDA guidance, while also reducing projected capital expenditures, signaling an improved cash flow outlook and a focus on cost-saving initiatives and operational efficiency.

feed.title: SEALSQ and Kaynes Semicon Mark a Major Milestone in the Development of India’s First Post-Quantum Cryptography Personalization Center with the Inauguration of Kaynes’ New OSAT Facility in Sanand, Gujarat
feed.summary: SEALSQ and Kaynes Semicon have announced a significant step in India's semiconductor journey with the opening of Kaynes Semicon’s OSAT facility in Sanand, Gujarat, which will house India's first Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) Personalization Center. This center, operating under the SEALKAYNESQ joint venture, will enable sovereign, large-scale personalization of quantum-safe semiconductor devices using SEALSQ's QS7001 platform, ensuring India's digital future against quantum threats. The initiative aims to provide end-to-end, India-controlled semiconductor production, eliminating supply chain vulnerabilities and supporting national digital identity programs and IoT ecosystems.

feed.title: AES clears 2028 note changes, trimming merger backstop commitments
feed.summary: The AES Corporation announced the successful completion of a consent solicitation for its 5.450% Senior Notes due 2028, allowing amendments to the indenture. Holders who provided valid consents will receive a $2,250,000 payment. The amendments will become operative and the consent fee will be paid only upon the consummation of the merger with Horizon Parent, L.P., expected in late 2026 or early 2027, and will also reduce commitments under Parent's backstop facility.

feed.title: Foster & Foster Acquires Indiana-Based United Actuarial Services, Inc.
feed.summary: Foster & Foster Consulting Actuaries, Inc. has announced the acquisition of Indiana-based United Actuarial Services, Inc. (UAS), further expanding its presence in the Taft-Hartley pension and health care plans sector. This acquisition strengthens Foster & Foster's position as a leader in actuarial and benefit consulting services, bringing its total client base to 3,000 Taft-Hartley and governmental entities. UAS will continue to operate from its Carmel, Indiana office, providing an expanded range of resources and expertise to clients.

feed.title: Do creators still need Adobe in the AI era?
feed.summary: Adobe is navigating the challenge of integrating AI into its creative tools without alienating its professional user base or compromising the trust of enterprise clients. The company faces pressure to balance rapid AI innovation with the need for stability and reliability, as evidenced by its stock performance and recent leadership changes. Ultimately, Adobe aims to maintain its relevance by focusing on workflow integration, brand consistency, and creative distinctiveness in an era where content generation is increasingly commoditized.

feed.title: After 900 sustainability projects, Host Hotels lands Nareit award
feed.summary: Host Hotels & Resorts has been honored with Nareit's 2026 Leader in the Light® Award for Operations, recognizing its comprehensive approach to sustainability and resilience. The company's efforts include completing nearly 900 sustainability projects since 2020, resulting in $24 million in annual savings, and fully allocating $2.45 billion in green bond proceeds. This award highlights Host's commitment to integrating environmental and social considerations into its investment strategy for long-term value creation.

feed.title: Federal agencies gain 11 IBM AI tools on AWS GovCloud, including watsonx
feed.summary: IBM has expanded its FedRAMP portfolio by securing authorization for 11 AI and automation software solutions, including several watsonx products, for deployment on AWS GovCloud (U.S.). This authorization, achieved through a strategic collaboration with AWS, quadruples IBM's FedRAMP offerings and provides federal agencies with compliant and mission-ready AI capabilities. The suite of tools ranges from watsonx.ai for foundation models and watsonx.governance for AI lifecycle management to automation solutions for identity management and application optimization.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare Kicks off Month of Volunteerism and Announces $2 Million HCA Healthcare Foundation Grant to Second Harvest Food Bank of Middle Tennessee
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare Foundation has announced a $2 million grant to Second Harvest Food Bank of Middle Tennessee to support the development of their new Grow for Good campus. This investment aims to double the food bank's capacity, expand services beyond food, and create a hub for community collaboration, addressing a 46% increase in need since 2020. The announcement also aligns with HCA Healthcare's annual "We Show Up for Our Communities" volunteer initiative during National Volunteer Month.

feed.title: UP Fiber Acquires AT&T’s Upper Peninsula Wireline Network, Expanding Local Ownership Across the Region
feed.summary: UP Fiber has successfully acquired AT&T’s wireline network in Michigan's Upper Peninsula and Mackinaw City, encompassing over 9,000 miles of infrastructure. This acquisition marks a significant expansion of locally-owned telecommunications, with UP Fiber planning to invest substantially in modernizing the network, improving reliability, and expanding broadband services to over 200,000 potential customers in partnership with Michigan Broadband. The aim is to enhance critical communications services for homes, businesses, and institutions across the region.

feed.title: Macy's, Inc. to Participate in J.P. Morgan 12th Annual Retail Round Up
feed.summary: Macy's, Inc. announced that its Chairman and CEO, Tony Spring, and COO and CFO, Tom Edwards, will participate in the J.P. Morgan 12th Annual Retail Round Up on April 8, 2026. The company, known for its Macy's, Bloomingdale's, and Bluemercury nameplates, will have its executives present at the event. This participation provides an opportunity for Macy's leadership to engage with the financial community regarding the company's strategies and outlook.

feed.title: Macy’s, Inc. to Participate in J.P. Morgan 12th Annual Retail Round Up
feed.summary: Macy's, Inc. announced that its chairman and CEO, Tony Spring, and COO and CFO, Tom Edwards, will participate in the J.P. Morgan 12th Annual Retail Round Up on April 8, 2026. The company, known for Macy's, Bloomingdale's, and Bluemercury, continues to engage with the investment community. This announcement follows recent news of their return to annual comparable sales growth and an increase in their quarterly dividend.
